TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Afghanistan, title = Afghanistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Afghanistan} }

S.FORM: Afghanistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 33 00 N, 65 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 652,230 sq km (maki' tay 41ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 652,230 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 33,332,025. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 58.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 39.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' pzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kabul. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 19 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zywaw na kinkesan zywaw na raran 古代 spuwah na semong sinsi 'lwa,wayan magal kawas ga maki squilq na rhyal Afuhan la.Afuhan ga maki na 中亞 spayat tuqiy. ggalan pila cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru CIA 外交部

Afghanistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 33 00 N, 65 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 652,230 sq km (maki' tay 41ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 652,230 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 33,332,025. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 58.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 39.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' pzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kabul. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 19 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zywaw na kinkesan zywaw na raran 古代 spuwah na semong sinsi 'lwa,wayan magal kawas ga maki squilq na rhyal Afuhan la.Afuhan ga maki na 中亞 spayat tuqiy. ggalan pila cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru CIA 外交部
S.PHON: a*ɣħanis~ɕtan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa * s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ pzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kaβul. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕħra* ɣħani aħma*zai, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. zjwaw na kinkes~ɕan zjwaw na raran ** s~ɕpuwaħ na s~ɕemoŋ s~ɕins~ɕi ʔlwa,wajan maɣal kawas~ɕ ɣa maki s~ɕquilq na rħjal a*uħan la.a*uħan ɣa maki na ** s~ɕpajat tuqij. ɣɣalan pila ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiru ʦ~ʨia ***
